name: Beignets (New Orleans-Style Square Donuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the roll mix according to package directions, adding 1/4 cup sugar to the flour mixture and 1 teaspoon vanilla to hot water.
2. When kneading is completed, coat a bowl with shortening or oil and roll the dough ball in the bowl to coat it with oil. Cover with waxed paper and a towel, then refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
3. Remove the dough from the refrigerator; punch down and cut each piece in half.
4. On a lightly floured surface, roll out each half to make a 9 x 12-inch rectangle.
5. Cut each rectangle into 12 (3-inch) squares.
6. Cover with a towel and let rise for 30 minutes.
7. Deep fry the beignets, two at a time. Fry for 1-1/2 minutes on one side, then turn and fry for another 1-1/2 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Sprinkle generously with sifted confectioners' sugar.
Makes 2 dozen.
